title: gdk_bat.c:2861: BATassertHeadProps: Assertion `!b->H->nonil || cmp != 0' failed.
poc: SELECT '' AS bad, log(f.f1) from FLOAT8_TBL f;
key_bug_features: Log function with invalid float input causes assertion failure
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE FLOAT8_TBL(f1 double, f2 varchar(50) NOT NULL);
SELECT log(f1) AS log_value FROM FLOAT8_TBL WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT f1, f2 FROM FLOAT8_TBL WHERE f1 < 0 OR f2 LIKE 'valid%';
